form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Goulburn (25.40) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length sixth. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Bulli over 400m. Last start finished 5th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 11 lengths (30.31) behind See This in a Grade 5 on April 9. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when eighth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at The Gardens over 400m in 22.63. Followed that up with a minor placing over 300m at Taree Super Track at Grade 4/5 two-and-a-half weeks ago. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked through the 1st turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 4 length fourth (29.86) at Wentworth Park. Previous form sound including a win three back at Wentworth Park. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 4 length fourth (29.86) at Wentworth Park. Previous form sound including a win three back at Wentworth Park. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 3rd on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Deep Space beaten 2.25 lengths (29.76) in a Grade 5. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 3rd on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Deep Space beaten 2.25 lengths (29.76) in a Grade 5. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond to win by one length in 22.97, beating Mister Anatoly. Last start finished 5th over 365m at this track beaten 5 lengths (21.34) behind Out Express in a Grade 5 on April 6. Prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond to win by one length in 22.97, beating Mister Anatoly. Last start finished 5th over 365m at this track beaten 5 lengths (21.34) behind Out Express in a Grade 5 on April 6. Prepared to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Knuckled as the start was effected; Dislodged muzzle as a result.
Checked off heels rounding the home turn and fell.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has run hot time here with a 29.4 PB at the distance. Key chance.
